escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with Russia launching 400 drones at Ukraine, ongoing US-Iran war with casualties, and Israel planning to occupy southern Lebanon.

ticker_items: Russia fires ~400 drones at Ukraine in major spring offensive launch
Iran sets 5 conditions to end war as US claims ongoing talks
Israel announces plans to occupy southern Lebanon to Litani River
Ukrainian drones crash in Baltic NATO states Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia
Strait of Hormuz partially reopening for 'non-hostile vessels'

eastern_europe.description: Daylight drone strike on apartment block during massive 400-drone barrage

middle_east.description: Iranian missile strike on Tel Aviv injures 6 people and damages buildings and vehicles.
Iranian missiles and drones targeted multiple Gulf Arab states.
Iranian missiles and drones targeted Israel and Gulf Arab states

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
US soldier deaths in Iran conflict

middle_east.text: Iran launches a fresh wave of missiles at Israel Tuesday – and six people were left injured following a strike in Tel Aviv.
middle_east.speaker: News report
middle_east.title: Media coverage

middle_east.text: Now is the time for every citizen, enterprise and institution, including government, to make resilience an everyday part of how we think and act.
middle_east.speaker: General Sir Richard Barrons
middle_east.title: Former British military commander

middle_east.text: Israel will occupy southern Lebanon up to the Litani River to create a defensive buffer
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Israeli Defence Minister

middle_east.text: Iranian armed forces will attack Israeli troops in the Gaza Strip if Israel continues its attacks on Lebanon and Palestinian territories
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps

middle_east.text: The United States is talking to the right people in Iran in an effort to end hostilities and the Iranians want to reach a deal very badly
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Irish investigation reveals Aughinish Alumina facility in Limerick has links to Russian military supply chains through aluminium trading networks. Government announces fuel relief package amid energy crisis.
Government weighing complex moral and legal questions about potential military involvement in defending the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts discuss how NZ could be drawn into the Iran war.

Intelligence experts assess Iranian 'sleeper cell' threats as rhetoric spikes since US-Israel war began. Over 125,000 Syrians fleeing Israeli strikes in Lebanon return home via Canadian-monitored border crossings.

NATO scrambled Polish fighter jets as Russian drone strikes neared Polish airspace during the massive 400-drone barrage on Ukraine. Poland continues providing military support and hosting Ukrainian refugees.
Holding elections clouded by Trump's push on Greenland while Danish military officials warn Europe needs to prepare for potential Russian attack on NATO by decade's end.
Prince Mohammed bin Salman reportedly pressuring Trump to intensify the Iran war while Saudi's East-West pipeline becomes crucial for global oil flow with Hormuz disrupted.
German President calls for permanent rupture with US over Trump's Iran war, marking significant departure from traditional German support for US military actions.

financial.notes: Global gas markets reaching boiling point with Iran-Hormuz crisis disrupting energy flows despite partial reopening for non-hostile vessels.

update_log.text: Iran sets five conditions to end war according to state TV broadcast
UN chief calls Middle East conflict 'out of control' and demands end to Iran war
Ukrainian drones confirmed crashed in Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia
Russia launches nearly 400 drones at Ukraine signaling spring offensive start
Israel announces plans to occupy southern Lebanon up to Litani River
Iran launches fresh wave of missiles at Israel, 6 injured in Tel Aviv attack.
Trump claims 'very good talks' with Iran while Tehran denies any negotiations taking place.
Reports suggest Netanyahu argued for joint US-Israeli operation to kill Khamenei.
Iran appoints Mohammad Zolghadr as new security chief amid external pressures.
